title: Single-Cell Transcriptomics Reveals the Cellular Heterogeneity of Cardiovascular Diseases.
author: Fu M Song J
content: S-EPMC8225933 PMC8225933 Single-Cell Transcriptomics Reveals the Cellular Heterogeneity of Cardiovascular Diseases. "A world in a wild flower, and a bodhi in a leaf," small cells contain huge secrets. The vasculature is composed of many multifunctional cell subpopulations, each of which
